# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest release on the `main` branch receives security fixes.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.

Report privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/sebastian/pve-soft-reset/security/advisories/new)
or by emailing the maintainer directly (see commit history for contact).

Include: affected version, reproduction steps, and impact assessment.
Expect an acknowledgement within 72 hours.
